attacking_style: Shows willingness to initiate early sprints from reduced groups (300m out), but lacks the explosive finishing power to sustain through to the line on technical finishes.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Appears capable of surviving selective racing to reach finale positioning, but downhill technical finishes expose power deficit in final 100m.
vulnerability: Mistimes sprint efforts when initiating early; lacks raw power to hold off late-surging pure finishers like Roglic on downhill technical finales.
key_patterns: Positioned well entering finals but struggles to convert advantage into results
Initiates finishing efforts too early, vulnerable to being overhauled in final meters
form_trajectory: unknown: Single 2019 observation shows positioning ability but finishing execution issues; insufficient recent data for trend analysis
